failedAssertions.reason: Required per-department envelope/committed/planned/remaining/utilization column breakdown is still not visible in the dashboard UI.
Submitter-side budget impact is present, but approver review surface still does not show equivalent budget impact summary metrics.
Changes-requested flow still lacks submitter edit/resubmit UI to restart chain from step 1.
Dedicated notification feed/bell event content is still not visible; only approval badges/counters are observed.
Audit trail shows chronological approvals but still lacks completed-request edit-history entries required by contract.
Expected disabled self-approve button with tooltip is not rendered; row remains view-only without specified affordance.

appliedUpdates.description: Added guidance for post-login selector reload behavior and using sidebar navigation when direct /approvals navigation is unstable.
